description: Synthetic Instagram scam pattern dataset with 1000 labeled profile examples for VERITAS hybrid identity analysis.

username_patterns.label: Platform or authority impersonation term in username
Investment or crypto term in username
Account recovery or unlock service term in username

message_signatures.label: Sugar scam with fee or verification
Account recovery service requests fee or login secret

ratio_rules.label: Low followers while following many accounts
Following an unusually large number of accounts

scam_types.investment_fraud: Crypto, forex, trading, cash-flip, and guaranteed-profit fraud.
scam_types.impersonation: Fake support, admin, brand, celebrity, or official-looking account.
scam_types.advance_fee: Requires payment before releasing money, job, prize, or service.
scam_types.employment_scam: Fake job or recruiter workflow with fees or credential harvesting.
scam_types.romance_scam: Relationship, sugar, emergency, or trust-building payment lure.
